caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing large black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a shock mount, which is attached to a boom arm labeled "Rode PSA1". Behind him is a wall covered in gray acoustic foam panels. The man is speaking and gesturing with his hands; in the initial sequence, his left hand is raised and blurred, indicating motion. As the sequence progresses, he continues to speak, shifting his gaze slightly and moving his arm. A tattoo is visible on his right shoulder and upper arm. His facial expressions change from open-mouthed speaking to a more closed-mouth, thoughtful expression while maintaining his focus toward someone off-camera.
